rows.label: qev079291_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ah, it's you! What
perfect timing! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0002
rows.name:
Metaphorically, I would equate the perfectness
of your timing with happening across an umbrella
at just the moment it begins to rain. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0003
rows.name:
Though I would not actually need an umbrella
due to my mask, but... Well, it's still a
fairly good metaphor, is it not? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0004
rows.name: *fsssssssssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0005
rows.name:
Ah, but no, *fsssh* I mustn't allow my
satisfaction with my well-crafted metaphor
to distract me from the matter at hand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0006
rows.name:
And that matter is a most interesting
Bias who is said to speak in riddles
known as "prophecies." *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0007
rows.name:
Contradictory though it sounds, he
says these messages from the past can
be used to see the future. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0008
rows.name:
Do you have any knowledge
of this man? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0009
rows.name:
I would very much like to ask him why
he chooses to speak in such a fashion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_JNK0010
rows.name: Assist[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_SEL0011
rows.name: Explain that Nimu Turton is the man he seeks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_JNK0020
rows.name: Decline[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_SEL0021
rows.name: Remain silent to avoid any potential trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0010
rows.name:
So this man dispenses his "prophecies" day and
night in the guise of a storyteller? *fsssh* A
most amusing and fascinating calling indeed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0011
rows.name:
I would very much like to
meet this Nimu. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0012
rows.name:
Or to put it in terms of the "prophecies"
in which he trades, perhaps I was
destined to encounter him. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0013
rows.name:
Then our encounter would be
fulfilling a "prophecy" crafted
thousands of years ago! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0014
rows.name:
What a strange feeling this is. I quite like it.
*fsssh* Hopefully Nimu will accept me as his
apprentice and teach me the ancient arts of prophecy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0015
rows.name: Oh? You haven't heard of him? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0016
rows.name:
Then this is more trouble than I
had hoped. *fsssh* My dreams of
"prophecy" will die here and now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0017
rows.name:
Clearly the metaphors taught to me by
Homer remain my lone calling. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0018
rows.name:
To craft a metaphor, it is analogous
to how we Zaruboggan can devoltanize
only voltant. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0019
rows.name:
So too shall I, Hoskeran, craft only
metaphors! *fsssh* ...Yes. Well said.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev079291_MSG0020
rows.name:
I shall continue my quest to master figurative speech.
I hope to make steady progress with each passing day,
and also hope I continue to enjoy your support. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]
